channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-23 21:39 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Today we're announcing two product changes for organizing communities on X: 1. XChat now supports jo...
item.description: Today we're announcing two product changes for organizing communities on X: 1. XChat now supports joinable links for groupchats. Create a public link & share direct to Timeline. With support for 350 members per chat (and growing), Groupchat Links are the fastest way to bring people together on X. 2. Due to declining usage, we're deprecating X Communities on May 6. To migrate your Community's members, pin your groupchat link so people can join it over the next 2 weeks. This is part of our broader effort to simplify the experience on X. Make no mistake: we are investing heavily in niche communities with the launch of Custom Timelines—and much more to come.

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla FSD V14.3.2 has just started rolling out to early access users. There is something new in the ...
item.description: Tesla FSD V14.3.2 has just started rolling out to early access users. There is something new in the release notes: Tesla has unified the model between Actually Smart Summon, FSD, and Robotaxi for more capable and reliable behavior.

item.title: @elonmusk: That’s a lot of illegal immigrants
item.description: That’s a lot of illegal immigrants

item.title: @elonmusk: Here’s how quickly Actually Smart Summon starts/reacts on FSD v14.3.2. It’s instant the moment you p...
item.description: Here’s how quickly Actually Smart Summon starts/reacts on FSD v14.3.2. It’s instant the moment you press start on your phone. Huge improvement@Tesla_AI!

item.title: @elonmusk: SPLC is an evil crime syndicate
item.description: SPLC is an evil crime syndicate

item.title: @elonmusk: Scott Adams nailed the prediction six years ago. "The SPLC is not a legitimate organization," he sai...
item.description: Scott Adams nailed the prediction six years ago. "The SPLC is not a legitimate organization," he said. And then he predicted ... well, you can see what he said next. August of 2020.

item.title: @elonmusk: The SPLC was basically a window repair service that went around smashing windows, to boost their sal...
item.description: The SPLC was basically a window repair service that went around smashing windows, to boost their sales. They created the demand for their own services. Reminds me of that old Ryan Long sketch😂

item.title: @elonmusk: Charlie Kirk reacts to the SPLC labeling TPUSA as a "hate group" (May 27, 2025): "They're literally ...
item.description: Charlie Kirk reacts to the SPLC labeling TPUSA as a "hate group" (May 27, 2025): "They're literally putting our high school chapters on a hate list next to the KKK and neo-Nazi groups." "Remember, there was a shooter who went to the Family Research Council years ago, inspired by the SPLC list." "This is them trying to make us basically surrender at TPUSA. We're going to do the opposite, and our students are only going to lean in even more." "But they can't debate us on our ideas. They can't have dialogue. They can't actually go on the merits of why they are right or why we might be wrong." "Instead, they must smear us with the age-old line that you are a racist or a hater. And they're finally realizing the power of TPUSA, which is why they put us on this hate list." When Tyler Robinson was asked by his boyfriend why he killed Charlie, he said, "I had enough of his hatred. Some hate can't be negotiated out." When asked by his parents, he replied, "The guy spreads too much hate."

item.title: @elonmusk: Reading this over and over is even better than sipping the finest of fine wine over and over.
item.description: Reading this over and over is even better than sipping the finest of fine wine over and over.

item.title: @elonmusk: Imagine being told for years that white supremacy was the greatest threat to humanity just to find o...
item.description: Imagine being told for years that white supremacy was the greatest threat to humanity just to find out that it only exists when a radical left organization pays for it.

item.title: @elonmusk: Feminization of the West creates the fertile landscape for suicidal empathy.
item.description: Feminization of the West creates the fertile landscape for suicidal empathy.
